name: IoTStorageClient
description: Client library for IoT Storage — a path-based lightweight SQL database with REST API. MQTT-inspired hierarchical records. Supports all CRUD operations, SQL queries, wildcard paths, and both synchronous & asynchronous HTTP modes. Compatible with ESP32, ESP8266, and all Arduino WiFi/Ethernet boards.
keywords: iot-storage, iot, database, sql, rest, path, mqtt, esp32, esp8266, arduino, client
